title: Design
description: We've captured the zoo's atmosphere through design, giving users a clear idea of what to expect from their visit.

concept.title: Concept
concept.description: A minimalist interface where vibrant animal photos and simple illustrations serve as accents, creating an emotional connection with the user.

illustrations.title: Illustrations
illustrations.description: The drawings were inspired by real zoo animals, each with a name and a story. They become characters that help navigate the website.

photos.title: Photos
photos.description: We used cute and funny photos of animals in natural settings without enclosures, as well as moments of human-animal interactions, to highlight the caring attitude towards them.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: The interface uses Inter Medium, a modern font with high legibility, soft geometry, and a minimalist feel.
